summary: NCAA Timeline feature testing completed successfully. All 14 requested features working correctly: tab switcher, NCAA Timeline component, Current Period banner, division selector pills (D1/D2/D3/NAIA), horizontal timeline bar with color-coded periods and NOW marker, legend, Key NCAA Dates section with status tags ('Passed', 'Xd away'), and My Calendar tab preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NCAA Timeline feature fully tested and working. Tab switching (My Calendar ↔ NCAA Timeline), division selector (D1/D2/D3/NAIA), current period banner with days remaining badge, horizontal timeline with NOW marker, color-coded periods (Contact/Dead/Evaluation/Quiet), legend, and Key NCAA Dates section with status tags all verified.

test_results.tab_switcher_present: PASS - data-testid='calendar-tabs' found with 'My Calendar' and 'NCAA Timeline' tabs
test_results.ncaa_timeline_tab_click: PASS - Switches to NCAA Timeline view
test_results.my_calendar_tab_click: PASS - Returns to calendar grid view
test_results.current_period_banner: PASS - Shows 'Contact Period' for D1 with 45 days remaining badge

division_selector_pills.D3: PASS - Shows full Contact period, 'No NLI for D3' info
division_selector_pills.NAIA: PASS - Shows full Contact period, 'NAIA Letter of Intent' info

test_results.timeline_bar: PASS - Color-coded horizontal bar with month labels
test_results.now_marker: PASS - 'NOW' marker visible at current date position
test_results.legend: PASS - Contact (teal), Dead (red), Evaluation (blue), Quiet (yellow) squares present
test_results.key_ncaa_dates_section: PASS - 6 date cards with icons, names, date ranges, status tags
test_results.nli_passed_tag: PASS - 'NLI Early Signing Period' shows 'Passed' tag
test_results.xd_away_tags: PASS - Found 5 'Xd away' tags for upcoming dates
test_results.my_calendar_functionality: PASS - Calendar grid, Add Event button, Upcoming Events sidebar all work after switching back

features_tested: Calendar page loads with tab switcher
Current Period banner with period name, division, description, days remaining badge
Division selector pills (D1, D2, D3, NAIA) switch timeline data correctly
D1 shows Contact/Dead/Evaluation/Quiet periods on timeline bar
D3 shows full Contact period across entire timeline
NAIA shows full Contact period across entire timeline
NOW marker visible on timeline bar at correct position
Legend shows Contact/Dead/Evaluation/Quiet with colored squares
Key NCAA Dates section shows date cards with icons, names, date ranges, status tags
NLI Early Signing Period shows 'Passed' tag
Upcoming dates show 'Xd away' tags with correct day counts
My Calendar tab still works with existing calendar grid, event creation, sidebar
